modes.intent: Maximise information density for expert, mouse-and-keyboard users on large screens (dashboards, admin consoles, data grids).

responsive_transformations: Below 1024px viewport width, promote compact to comfortable so targets and spacing grow for smaller screens.
On any coarse-pointer (touch) device, override to touch regardless of viewport — never serve 32px targets to fingers.
When the user zooms past 150% or sets a large base font, relax row heights toward comfortable to prevent clipping.
Sticky headers and frozen columns retain compact metrics but keep a 32px minimum interactive height.
notes: Compact is opt-in or expert-default, not the universal default; it assumes a pointer with sub-pixel precision.
Hit areas may visually appear dense but must still satisfy a 32px interactive box via padding, not just the icon glyph.
Pair compact with restrained motion; dense grids amplify any animation churn.
Provide a one-click density toggle so users can escape compact without leaving the screen.
